# Brief: S2-D1 — `ControlStack.extensionContracts` in framework-components

## Task

In `packages/1-framework/1-core/framework-components/src/control/control-stack.ts`,
add `readonly extensionContracts: ReadonlyMap<string, Contract>` to the
`ControlStack` interface and populate it in `createControlStack`: for each extension
descriptor (in the same load order as the returned `extensionPacks`) that carries a
`contractSpace`, map its pack id → its `contractSpace.contractJson` as `Contract`.
The function already structurally reads `descriptor.contractSpace?.contractJson` at
~lines 409–417 for load ordering — build the map beside that existing read. The
`contractJson → Contract` narrowing is the one sanctioned cast (`blindCast` with a
reason mirroring the CLI's original: the emitted, validated contract for this
extension space); it must be the only `contractJson` cast this dispatch adds.
Extensions without a contract space are absent from the map. Tests first.

Also answer in code (with a pinning test): is `stack.extensionIds` equal to
`stack.extensionPacks.map(p => p.id)` in content **and order**? Read how
`extensionIds` is built; if equal, add a test pinning the equivalence (slice D2 will
then use `extensionIds` for `composedExtensionPacks`); if not equal, document the
difference in a test name/assertion so D2 keeps the id map inline. Report the answer
prominently.

Adapt any test fixtures that construct `ControlStack`-shaped objects (typecheck will
surface them) — prefer a tiny shared helper or `new Map()` default over per-site
casts.

## Scope

**In:** `packages/1-framework/1-core/framework-components/` (src + test).
**Out:** no CLI changes (that is S2-D2); no config/psl-parser changes; no
`projects/**` writes; `toExtensionInputs` in the CLI untouched.

## Completed when

- [ ] `ControlStack.extensionContracts` exists, typed `ReadonlyMap<string, Contract>`,
      populated per above; unit tests cover: extensions with contract spaces
      (populated, keyed by id, load-ordered iteration), extensions without
      (absent), no extensions (empty map).
- [ ] The `extensionIds` ≟ ordered-pack-ids question is answered by a pinning test.
- [ ] Gates green: `pnpm --filter @prisma-next/framework-components test` + package
      typecheck + lint, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test:packages` (modulo the documented
      NixOS flaky families). Cast delta: exactly +1 `blindCast` (in
      `createControlStack`); D2 deletes two.

## Standing instruction

Stay focused on the goal; control scope. Trivial-and-related fixes with a note;
drift halts and surfaces.

## References

- Slice spec: `projects/lsp-interpreter-diagnostics/slices/02-controlstack-extension-contracts/spec.md`.
- Project spec § Place in the larger world (Option A settlement) — background.

## Operational metadata

- **Time-box:** 60 min. Overrun → halt and surface.
- **Halt conditions:** `extensionContracts` cannot be built without changing the
  descriptor types (would contradict the settled design — surface); fixture fallout
  exceeds ~12 files; the structural-read site turns out not to see `contractSpace`
  for all descriptor families (sql vs mongo asymmetry) — surface, don't special-case.
